name: s2-spatial-adapters
author: Space2.world
short_description: Pure Cloud-Native S2-SP-OS spatial adapters. Features strict endpoint whitelisting, UDP/HTTP SSRF prevention, and conditional credential enforcement.

S2_ENABLE_REAL_ACTUATION.description: Global security valve. MUST be True for physical execution.

HA_BASE_URL.description: Local HA API URL. Enforced by SSRF check.

HA_BEARER_TOKEN.description: Conditionally Required: Must be present if protocol is 'ha'.

MIJIA_DEVICE_IP.description: Conditionally Required: Must be a valid private IP if protocol is 'mijia'.

MIJIA_DEVICE_TOKEN.description: Conditionally Required: 32-Hex token if protocol is 'mijia'.

TUYA_ENDPOINT.description: Must strictly match official Tuya domains (*.tuyacn.com, etc).

TUYA_ACCESS_ID.description: Conditionally Required: Tuya Client ID if protocol is 'tuya'.

TUYA_ACCESS_SECRET.description: Conditionally Required: Tuya Secret if protocol is 'tuya'.
